name: Smoked Turkey Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Smoked turkey, skinned and cut into 2-inch julienne strips
1 1/2 cups Sherry Mayonnaise, salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
2 cups Grapes, seedless, red or green
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the turkey, Jarlsberg, grapes, and celery in a mixing bowl.
2. Add the Sherry Mayonnaise and toss gently but thoroughly. Season to taste with salt and pepper and toss again. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
3. Arrange the salad in serving portions and sprinkle with green peppercorns to taste.
Cooked, lightly smoked ham or chicken may be substituted for turkey.
